summary: Kang Hyunwoo finds himself in a desperate battle against Edward, an immortal black mage, while relying on his friend Youngchan to relay urgent messages. As Hyunwoo struggles to maintain his defense, his master Lebron arrives to intervene, turning the tide of the fight. Lebron reveals that the key to defeating Edward's supposed immortality is to systematically destroy him until nothing remains for regeneration.
key_moments: Hyunwoo struggles in a combat exchange with Edward, struggling to survive despite activating various strength-enhancing skills.
Youngchan acts as a liaison, relaying a distress message from Hyunwoo as the situation turns dire.
Lebron arrives at the battlefield, confronting Edward and demonstrating his superior combat power by cutting through Edward's regeneration tactics.
